items.content_html: Theme designed with readability and customizability in mind. Change it easily to your liking with the Style Settings plugin installed.
items.title: SlRvb/Obsidian--ITS-Theme: Theme designed with readability and customizability in mind. Change it easily to your liking with the Style Settings plugin installed.

items.content_html: Plugin for obsidian that automatically generates virtual links for text within your notes that match with the titles or aliases of other notes in your vault.
items.title: vschroeter/obsidian-virtual-linker: Plugin for obsidian that automatically generates virtual links for text within your notes that match with the titles or aliases of other notes in your vault.

items.content_html: Obsidian overhaul plugin for easier planning and improved note discoverability
items.title: ftvkyo/obsidian-ftvkyo: Obsidian overhaul plugin for easier planning and improved note discoverability

items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: This is an enhancing export plugin base on Pandoc for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md/ ). It's allow you to export to formats like Markdown、Markdown (Hugo https://gohugo.io/ )、Html、docx、Latex etc.
items.title: mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export: This is an enhancing export plugin base on Pandoc for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md/ ). It's allow you to export to formats like Markdown、Markdown (Hugo https://gohugo.io/ )、Html、docx、Latex etc.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian that lets you Automatically open a buffer for the current file in a listening neovim instance
items.title: TheseusGrey/edit-in-neovim: A plugin for Obsidian that lets you Automatically open a buffer for the current file in a listening neovim instance

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that automatically link bible verses to YouVersion bible.

items.content_html: Official Instapaper plugin for Obsidian
items.title: Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper: Official Instapaper plugin for Obsidian

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that ensures each note occupies only one tab. If a note is already open, its existing tab will be focussed instead of opening the same file in the current tab.
items.title: czottmann/obsidian-mononote: An Obsidian plugin that ensures each note occupies only one tab. If a note is already open, its existing tab will be focussed instead of opening the same file in the current tab.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin to add last modified date to Markdown documents that actually works with Obsidian Sync.
items.title: c1sc0c0/TimeTail: Obsidian plugin to add last modified date to Markdown documents that actually works with Obsidian Sync.

items.content_html: A rehype plugin that renders a json-canvas element (obsidian.md) embedded in a markdown doc.
items.title: lovettbarron/rehype-jsoncanvas: A rehype plugin that renders a json-canvas element (obsidian.md) embedded in a markdown doc.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin providing dynamically scoped tree views of multidimensional semantic and logcal archictectures of your vault.
items.title: jeetsukumaran/obsidian-bearings: An Obsidian plugin providing dynamically scoped tree views of multidimensional semantic and logcal archictectures of your vault.

items.content_html: Plugin for https://obsidian.md/ that assists with managing tasks within a document.
items.title: ebullient/obsidian-task-collector: Plugin for https://obsidian.md/ that assists with managing tasks within a document.
